About the doctor

Dr. Siddharth Mehta

With over 8 years of clinical experience, Dr. Siddharth Mehta brings precision and warmth to every treatment. Holding BDS and MDS degrees, he specialises in implantology and laser dentistry at our modern clinic in Ahmedabad.

From routine cleanings to full smile makeovers, every patient receives personalised, comfortable care using the latest technology at our Sun Gravitas clinic, Shyamal Cross Road.

Dental ImplantsLaser Dentistry Smile DesignOrthodontics Painless RCTCosmetic Dentistry

What we offer

Our Treatments

Comprehensive dental care under one roof — from prevention to complex restorations.

01
Dental Implants
Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacement using titanium implants fused to the jawbone.
02
Laser Dentistry
Minimally invasive laser treatments for gums, cavities and whitening — faster healing, less discomfort.
03
Smile Design
Complete aesthetic transformation — veneers, bonding, whitening and contouring for your dream smile.
04
Orthodontics
Braces and clear aligners to straighten teeth and correct bite for all ages.
05
Root Canal
Comfortable RCT to save infected teeth — quick, safe and virtually painless with rotary instruments.
06
Preventive Care
Cleanings, X-rays, fluoride and sealants to keep your teeth and gums healthy for life.

Real patient results

Before & After

Actual results from our patients — achieved with precision and the latest techniques.

Teeth Cleaning
& Whitening

Heavy tartar removed with professional scaling, followed by laser whitening — dramatically brighter smile in a single visit.

1

3 Steps

Dental Implant

Missing tooth replaced with a permanent titanium implant. X-rays confirm perfect placement — a lifetime solution.

Lifetime
Durability
100%
Natural look

Root Canal Treatment

Painless RCT using advanced rotary instruments. Digital X-rays confirm complete cleaning — saving your natural tooth.

Painless
Procedure
1–2
Visits required

Dental Bridge

Missing tooth restored with a fixed dental bridge — seamlessly blending with surrounding teeth to restore your smile.

Fixed
Permanent
2–3
Visits required

Composite Filling

Deep cavity restored with tooth-coloured composite resin — completely invisible and bonded for a lasting result.
